summary.lv: Mintos meklē Backend Engineer (Java), kurš strādās ar maksājumu infrastruktūru ieguldījumu platformai miljoniem Eiropas investoru. Hibrīds darbs Rīgā, atalgojums €4400–4800 mēnesī.
summary.en: Mintos is hiring a Backend Engineer (Java) to build payment infrastructure for a passive income investing platform serving millions of European investors, offering €4,400–4,800/month in a hybrid role.
